content:

# Best Chat App for OpenClaw: Telegram, Discord, or Slack? Best chat app for OpenClaw compared: Telegram wins for most users, Discord for power users, Slack for teams. Best Chat App for OpenClaw: Telegram, Discord, or Slack? Read https://www.stack-junkie.com/blog/which-chat-app-works-best-with-openclaw and follow the instructions to help me with: Best Chat App for OpenClaw: Telegram, Discord, or Slack?. OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) connects to Telegram, Discord, Slack, Signal, WhatsApp, and several other platforms through a single gateway process. For running multiple channels at once (say, Telegram for personal use and Discord for a team), see OpenClaw multi-agent and multi-channel setup guide. Telegram is the fastest, most stable path to a working OpenClaw setup. There's no `openclaw channels login` step for Telegram. Full setup: OpenClaw Telegram Setup Guide. ## Slack setup for OpenClaw: Socket Mode and token requirements. Setup uses `openclaw channels login --channel whatsapp`, which launches a QR code scan on first run.

# Discord. # ​ Discord (Bot API). ## Channel troubleshooting. Create a Discord application and bot. openclaw config set channels.discord.token --ref-provider default --ref-source env --ref-id DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN --dry-run. openclaw config set channels.discord.token --ref-provider default --ref-source env --ref-id DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN. openclaw config set channels.discord.enabled true --strict-json. openclaw pairing approve discord <CODE>`. ## ​ Recommended: Set up a guild workspace. ## ​ Runtime model. `agent:<agentId>:discord:channel:<channelId>`. `channels.discord.dm.groupEnabled=false`. `agent:<agentId>:discord:slash:<userId>`. ## ​ Forum channels. `openclaw message send --channel discord --target channel:<forumId> \. `openclaw message thread create --channel discord --target channel:<forumId> \. ## ​ Interactive components. `channels.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom`. `channels.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom`. ## ​ Native commands and command auth. `channels.discord.dms["<user_id>"].historyLimit`. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.ackReaction`. | reactions, messages, threads, pins, polls, search, memberInfo, roleInfo, channelInfo, channels, voiceStatus, events, stickers, emojiUploads, stickerUploads, permissions | enabled |. `channels.discord.ui.components.accentColor`. `channels.discord.accounts.<id>.ui.components.accentColor`. ## ​ Voice channels. `channels.discord.voice.enabled=false`. ## ​ Voice messages. `message(action="send", channel="discord", target="channel:123", path="/path/to/audio.mp3", asVoice=true)`. ## ​ Troubleshooting. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.eventQueue.listenerTimeout`. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.inboundWorker.runTimeoutMs`. `channels.discord.dm.enabled=false`. `channels.discord.voice.daveEncryption=true`. `channels.discord.voice.decryptionFailureTolerance=24`. `discord voice: DAVE decrypt failures detected`. ## ​ Configuration reference pointers. ## ​ Related.

For step-by-step screenshots and the full panel + onboarding flow, use the deployment guide: https://www.tencentcloud.com/techpedia/139184. Deploy one instance, connect one channel, add one skill, and run one workflow for a week. When you are ready to run it 24/7 in a clean, isolated environment, start here again: Tencent Cloud Lighthouse Special Offer. The big wins are boring: repeatable setup, predictable inputs, and clear failure paths.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Tip #2: Set Up Cron Jobs for Automated Daily Tasks
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw Tip #2: Set Up Cron Jobs for Automated Daily Tasks. OpenClaw cron job automation - futuristic clock mechanism with digital circuits. One of OpenClaw’s most powerful features is its built-in **cron job scheduler**. ## How OpenClaw Cron Jobs Work. Cron jobs run inside the Gateway process, not the AI model itself. Jobs are persisted at `~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json`, so they survive restarts. ## Creating Your First Cron Job. ## Useful Cron Job Ideas. ## Managing Cron Jobs. # Run a job manually. openclaw cron run <job-id>. openclaw cron runs --id <job-id>. openclaw cron delete <job-id>`. **Pro tip:** Schedule resource-intensive cron jobs during off-peak hours (late night) to avoid hitting API rate limits during your active working hours. ##### Michael So Shares AI Publication at Hong Kong Legislative Council with Councilors Lau Chi-pang and Chan Hok-fung. ##### From 0 to 1 Deploying WuKong: Standard SOP for Enterprise AI Implementation. ##### Why Enterprises Need WuKong: Three Major Pain Points of AI Transformation and How to Break Through.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw cron scheduler guide with main and isolated runs
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

Cron is for tasks that need a precise schedule or tasks you want to keep out of your main conversation history. Heartbeat handles the recurring background checks and cron handles “at a specific time” and “run this job in isolation.”. OpenClaw keeps cron job definitions on disk and it keeps per-run history separately. OpenClaw cron supports three scheduling patterns and you pick based on the job you’re building. A main session cron job drops a system event into your main session then the agent processes it with full context. A cron job can run and do nothing visible or it can deliver output to a channel. ## Creating cron jobs via chat. The agent can convert that into a cron schedule plus an isolated message payload plus delivery targeting. Create an isolated cron job with a cron expression like `0 7 * * *` and set announce delivery to your preferred channel and target. ### Why did my cron job not run?

title: 🦞 How to Set Up OpenClaw Cron Jobs (With Examples You Can Copy)
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw cron jobs: automate your AI agent while you sleep. * OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) has built-in cron jobs that let your agent run tasks on a schedule without you being present. * What are OpenClaw cron jobs. ## What are OpenClaw cron jobs. Cron jobs are scheduled tasks that your OpenClaw agent executes automatically. An agent with cron jobs runs scheduled tasks at 7 AM, backs up files every hour, and sends weekly reports without manual triggering. Just tell your agent what you want scheduled and it will create the cron job for you. > "Create a cron job that runs every morning at 7 AM UTC. When a cron job runs in the main session, it has access to the full conversation history. For a complete walkthrough of building a morning briefing cron job, see OpenClaw Morning Briefing: 10-Minute Setup That Actually Works. Q: How many cron jobs can I run? * OpenClaw documentation on cron jobs.
